creator: alexs@snark.rinet.ru
text:
INDEX does not contains lines about new ports (strace, for example). Also,
information about old ports versions is out of date (midnight commander has
version 4.5.51 there vs. 4.5.54 in distfiles and ports tree).

Fix: 

Run the script to build INDEX once a day by somebody who is responsible 
for that <g>.
How-To-Repeat: 
Well, commit a new port or update version of any old one and check next day 
the INDEX file.
